$comment: Mobile Input Form Hint Text Component Tokens
$description: Component tokens for Mobile Input Form Hint Text component that provides contextual guidance and validation feedback below input fields. Supports multiple states including default (neutral), success, destructive (error), and warning variants across 3 sizes (sm, md, lg). Figma Reference: Node ID 8-68031

$component.name: Input Form Hint Text
$component.description: A mobile form component that displays helpful text, instructions, or validation messages below input fields. Provides contextual guidance to users about input requirements, format expectations, or validation status. Supports multiple semantic states for different types of feedback.
$component.structure: Text element positioned below input field with appropriate spacing, supporting multiple semantic color variants

sizes.3xs: Extra small size for compact mobile interfaces - typically 8px-9px
sizes.2xs: Extra small size for compact mobile interfaces - typically 10px-11px
sizes.xs: Small size for compact mobile interfaces - typically 12px-13px
sizes.sm: Small size for compact mobile interfaces - typically 12px-13px
sizes.md: Medium size (commonly used default for mobile) - typically 13px-14px
sizes.lg: Large size for prominent mobile forms - typically 14px-16px

variants.default: Neutral hint text with gray colors for standard guidance and instructions
variants.success: Success state with green colors for positive validation feedback
variants.destructive: Error state with red colors for validation errors and warnings
variants.warning: Warning state with orange/yellow colors for cautionary messages
variants.disabled: Disabled state with muted colors when form is disabled

usage.contexts: Mobile forms, input validation, password requirements, format instructions, character limits, field descriptions, error messages, success confirmations
usage.features: Contextual guidance, validation feedback, format instructions, character count, error messaging, success confirmation

text.$comment: Typography tokens for mobile input form hint text across all sizes

3xs.description: Mobile hint text typography for 3xs size - Regular 10px/15px

2xs.description: Mobile hint text typography for 2xs size - Regular 11px/16px

xs.description: Mobile hint text typography for xs size - Regular 12px/17px

sm.description: Mobile hint text typography for sm size - Regular 13px/18px

md.description: Mobile hint text typography for md size - Regular 14px/20px

lg.description: Mobile hint text typography for lg size - Regular 14px/20px

color.$comment: Color tokens for mobile input form hint text states - includes default (neutral), success, destructive (error), warning, and disabled variants

default.description: Mobile default hint text color - gray/600 - #475467

success.description: Mobile success hint text color - success/600 - #039855

destructive.description: Mobile destructive hint text color - error/500 - #f04438

warning.description: Mobile warning hint text color - warning/600 - #dc6803

disabled.description: Mobile disabled hint text color - gray/400 - #98a2b3
